sentences.target: Ich schicke dir den Vertrag per E-Mail.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃɪkə diːɐ̯ deːn fɛʁˈtʁaːk pɛʁ ˈiːmeɪ̯l/

translations.de: Ich schicke dir den Vertrag per E-Mail.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃɪkə diːɐ̯ deːn fɛʁˈtʁaːk pɛʁ ˈiːmeɪ̯l/
translations.en: I’m sending you the contract by email.
translations.es: Te envío el contrato por correo electrónico.
translations.fr: Je t’envoie le contrat par e-mail.
translations.it: Ti mando il contratto via email.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在通过电子邮件把合同发给你。
translations.ru: Я отправляю тебе контракт по электронной почте.
translations.pt: Estou a enviar-te o contrato por e-mail.
translations.he: אני שולח לך את החוזה במייל.
translations.vi: Tôi đang gửi hợp đồng cho bạn qua email.
translations.ar: أنا أرسل لك العقد عبر البريد الإلكتروني.
translations.nl: Ik stuur je het contract per e-mail.
translations.uk: Я надсилаю тобі контракт електронною поштою.
translations.hi: मैं आपको ईमेल से अनुबंध भेज रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σου στέλνω το συμβόλαιο με email.
translations.nb: Jeg sender deg kontrakten på e-post.
translations.id: Saya mengirimkan kontrak ke kamu lewat email.
translations.sv: Jag skickar kontraktet till dig via e-post.
translations.da: Jeg sender dig kontrakten på e-mail.
translations.ja: メールで契約書を送っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
2nd-person singular dative personal pronoun; indirect object (recipient).
Definite article; accusative masculine singular, determiner of 'Vertrag'.
Common noun; masculine, singular, accusative; direct object of 'schicke'.
Preposition meaning 'via/by means of'; governs accusative; introduces a manner/means PP.
Common noun; feminine, singular, accusative; complement of 'per' indicating the medium.

sentences.target: Er schickt die Tickets per Post.

translations.de: Er schickt die Tickets per Post.
translations.en: He’s sending the tickets by post.
translations.es: Él envía las entradas por correo.
translations.fr: Il envoie les billets par la poste.
translations.it: Lui spedisce i biglietti per posta.
translations.pt: Ele envia os bilhetes pelo correio.
translations.vi: Anh ấy gửi vé qua đường bưu điện.
translations.nl: Hij stuurt de kaartjes per post.
translations.hi: वह टिकट डाक से भेज रहा है.
translations.el: Στέλνει τα εισιτήρια με το ταχυδρομείο.
translations.ja: 彼はチケットを郵送で送っています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Definite article; accusative plural, determiner of 'Tickets'.
Common noun; neuter, plural, accusative; direct object of 'schickt'.
Preposition meaning 'via/by means of'; governs accusative; introduces manner/means PP.
Common noun; feminine, singular, accusative; complement of 'per' specifying the medium ('per Post').

sentences.target: Wir zahlen die Miete per Überweisung.

translations.de: Wir zahlen die Miete per Überweisung.
translations.en: We pay the rent by bank transfer.
translations.es: Pagamos el alquiler por transferencia bancaria.
translations.fr: Nous payons le loyer par virement bancaire.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们通过银行转账支付房租。
translations.ru: Мы платим за аренду банковским переводом.
translations.pt: Pagamos a renda por transferência bancária.
translations.he: אנחנו משלמים את שכר הדירה בהעברה בנקאית.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi trả tiền thuê nhà bằng chuyển khoản ngân hàng.
translations.nl: We betalen de huur via een bankoverschrijving.
translations.uk: Ми платимо за оренду банківським переказом.
translations.hi: हम किराया बैंक ट्रांसफ़र से देते हैं.
translations.el: Πληρώνουμε το ενοίκιο με τραπεζική μεταφορά.
translations.id: Kami membayar uang sewa lewat transfer bank.
translations.ja: 家賃を銀行振込で支払っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; main predicate.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular, determiner of 'Miete'.
Common noun; feminine, singular, accusative; direct object of 'zahlen'.
Preposition meaning 'via/by means of'; governs accusative; introduces manner/means PP.
Common noun; feminine, singular, accusative; complement of 'per' specifying the payment method.

sentences.target: Ich buche die Plätze per App.

translations.de: Ich buche die Plätze per App.
translations.en: I’m booking the seats via the app.
translations.es: Estoy reservando los asientos en la app.
translations.fr: Je réserve les places via l’appli.
translations.pt: Estou a reservar os lugares pela app.
translations.he: אני מזמין את המקומות דרך האפליקציה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đặt chỗ bằng ứng dụng.
translations.nl: Ik boek de plaatsen via de app.
translations.hi: मैं ऐप से सीटें बुक कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Κλείνω τις θέσεις μέσω της εφαρμογής.
translations.ja: アプリで席を予約しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Definite article; accusative plural, determiner of 'Plätze'.
Common noun; plural, accusative; direct object of 'buche'.
Preposition meaning 'via/by means of'; governs accusative; introduces manner/means PP.
Common noun; feminine, singular, accusative; complement of 'per' indicating the medium.
